title: ComputeEntryScoreCommand
description: Payload for CMD.BSP.001.SCO.COMPUTE_ENTRY_SCORE — compute the one-time baseline behavioural score at enrolment. Idempotent on case_id over the lifetime of the case (INV.SCO.001).

case_id.description: UUIDv7 of the participation case minted upstream.

model_version.description: SemVer of the scoring model to apply for this baseline.

declarative_signals.description: Snapshot of the declarative signals collected at enrolment. The exact field set is owned by the FUNC ADR; this schema constrains the shape but not the enum of features (those are model-versioned and live in implement-capability-python).

Uuidv7.description: UUIDv7 (RFC 9562 §5.7) — version nibble = 7, variant nibble = 8/9/a/b. Per ADR-TECH-STRAT-007.
